# Card catalog

*Auto-generated from `src/data/cards.ts` — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `npm run catalog`.*

## How to suggest a new card

Just write the funny line — that's it. **Don't** worry about scoring, grammar, or
parts of speech; all of that gets sorted out when the card is added. Browse the lists
below to match the vibe and avoid duplicates, then send your lines over.

A few flavors to riff on:
- **Subjects** — who or what you're talking about ("My crooked opponent", "This great nation").
- **Things** — objects you praise or trash ("freedom and democracy", "the swamp").
- **Predicates** — what someone *does* or *is* ("kicks puppies", "is a national treasure").
  Some are *open* lines that need a thing to point at ("wants to destroy ___").
- **Finishers** — punchy taglines that cap a statement ("believe me").

Power level rises down each predicate section: *stump lines* are mild everyday
material, *signature zingers* are punchy and characterful, *reward cards* are
over-the-top. Aim a new line at whichever tier it feels like.

---

## Subjects — who / what you talk about

### About yourself
- I
- My administration
- My record
- My policies
- My totally normal administration
- My beautiful and completely legal campaign
- My famously firm handshake
- My award-winning common sense
- My position, which is the best position believe me,
- A stable genius such as myself
- My beautiful brain, which many people say is the best brain
- My incredibly well-organized and financially transparent campaign
- My plan, which fits neatly on a single index card
- My gut, which has frankly never once been wrong

### About your opponent
- My opponent
- My opponent's wife
- My opponent's donors
- Career politicians
- Washington insiders
- My opponent's team of untrustworthy weirdos
- My opponent's mysterious offshore friends
- My opponent's entirely imaginary list of accomplishments
- My idiot freedom-hating opponent
- My crooked, do-nothing opponent
- The malignant buffoons backing my opponent's campaign
- My opponent's army of elitist hall monitors
- The lobbyists who write my opponent's speeches
- My opponent's heavily focus-grouped personality

### About the crowd & country
- The American people
- Hardworking families
- Our children
- This great nation
- The brave people watching this debate
- The deeply normal and not-at-all-angry people of this country
- Our screen-addicted but still precious children
- The good people who actually showed up tonight
- Our tired but unbeaten small towns
- This beautiful country, flaws and all
- This great and proud nation
- The wonderful, beautiful people of this country

## Things (objects you praise or trash)

### Good things
- freedom and democracy
- our veterans
- small businesses
- the middle class
- our borders
- our public schools
- the Constitution
- the working man's paycheck
- Main Street
- the family farm
- common sense itself
- hardworking patriots

### Bad things
- Satan
- the swamp
- higher taxes
- shady lobbyists
- total chaos
- the bloated bureaucracy
- runaway inflation
- the special interests
- a do-nothing committee
- the radical fringe
- card-carrying communists

## Predicates — what they do / are

### Stump lines — mild, everyone fights over these

#### Praise
- delivers blue skies and happiness
- loves freedom and democracy
- is a true patriot
- is strong and decisive
- stands up for the little guy
- protects our veterans
- cuts taxes for working families
- will fully fund our schools
- will defend our liberty
- will always fight for you
- will always have your back
- will keep this country safe
- has read every single word of the Constitution and loved all of it

#### Insults
- kicks puppies
- secretly eats babies
- lies to your face
- is a national disgrace
- is weak and out of touch
- is an unscrupulous jackass
- wants to raise your taxes
- wants to cancel school lunch
- wants to silence free speech
- worships Satan
- ignores our veterans
- can't be trusted
- will say anything to get elected
- will destroy this country
- should be ashamed
- wants to tax your Christmas presents
- wants to put a toll booth on your driveway
- believes that freedom should have a monthly subscription
- naps through every important meeting

### Signature zingers — punchy, deck-defining

#### Brags
- will personally fight a bear for your freedom
- bench-presses small fishing boats before breakfast
- could fix the whole economy with a single phone call
- is never wrong about anything, ever
- is frankly a national treasure
- has the handshake of a champion and the hair of a statesman
- has the courage of ten senators and the humility of eleven
- will direct our nation's scientists to make the last 10% of a phone battery last longer
- once talked a hurricane into changing course
- personally returned a lost wallet on live television

#### Attacks
- wants to put a microchip in your flu shot
- secretly runs a secret llama-grooming cartel
- thinks the moon landing was filmed in a Denny’s
- eats crayons at cabinet meetings
- has a secret handshake with the deep state
- will sell this country to a Florida timeshare scheme
- would sell the Constitution for airline miles
- wants to replace the national anthem with screechy dubstep noises
- takes marching orders from Big Kale
- wants to replace the Supreme Court with a Magic Eight Ball
- has a secret plan to make happiness illegal
- couldn't find the economy with both hands and a map

#### Pander
- will deliver free ice cream every Friday
- tucks in every veteran at night
- will give every family a golden retriever
- high-fives every single voter personally
- will add three more Christmases to the national calendar
- will fight to ensure that every birthday feels special
- will establish a national nap hour for hardworking Americans
- wakes up every morning thinking about you, specifically
- will make Monday a second Saturday
- will personally refund your last parking ticket
- promises shorter lines at the DMV, forever
- will put a coffee shop on every single corner

### Open lines (need a thing to point at)
- is in bed with …
- wants to destroy …
- is bankrolled by …
- blames everything on …
- proudly defends …
- has declared war on …
- has sworn a blood oath to …
- keeps a framed photo of …
- would do absolutely anything for …

## Modifiers (asides that beef up a clause)
*Slip one in right after a subject — "My opponent, **who is ugly, just very ugly**, eats kittens." It intensifies the clause, adds a comedic aside, and can be played as a stall before you commit to a verb. Praising the wrong target backfires.*

- who is ugly, just very ugly
- who is as crooked as the day is long
- who lies constantly
- which is a total disaster
- who is frankly a national treasure
- who is an absolute genius
- who loves this country
- which is a blessing to us all
- who is among the stupidest humans to ever walk the Earth
- who somehow smells even worse than expected
- who, and I say this with love, has completely lost it
- who has frankly never looked better
- who is winning by every available metric
- which the experts are reportedly calling a triumph
- which frankly smells like a goat vomited into an overfilled catbox
- who cannot parallel park to save their life
- which is, between us, mostly held together with tape
- and trust me, what I'm about to say is absolutely true
- and I'm not making this up

## Connectors (chain clauses together)
- and
- but
- because
- and therefore
- which is why
- and frankly
- .  *(a period — free, but only one per statement)*

## Finishers (cap a statement)
- and I personally guarantee it
- and everyone knows it
- believe me
- and that is on the record
- and that's a promise
- and I don't care what the fact checkers say about it
- and frankly I'm tired of saying it
- and you can look that up, folks, it’s true
- and that's settled science
- period, end of story
- and you won't hear that from the other guy
- and history will prove me right
- write that down

## Power-ups (one-shot action cards, not part of the sentence)
- 📋 Search Notes — draw 5 cards
- 🎤 Teleprompter Typo — REPLACE their last word with yours
- 🧠 Forgot My Line — DELETE their last word
- 👏 Soundbite — your next statement ×1.5
- 🕵️ Plant in the Audience — reveal the crowd
- 🎙️ Hot Mic — see their hand, steal a card
- 🗣️ Filibuster — stock up on connectors

## Reward cards — campaign-only, over-the-top
- is a traitor to this very nation
- is secretly a lizard person
- wants to cancel Christmas forever
- eats live puppies on national television
- is the greatest leader in human history
- personally cured a deadly disease last Tuesday
- will give every citizen a pony and a tax cut
- is a once-in-a-generation genius
- has never once told the truth, not even by accident
- My crooked, treasonous opponent
- This blessed and chosen nation
